creator: tomek@cedro.info
text:
The last problem I have is my SYNAPTICS does not work with finger scroll. I would really love it to work the MacBook's way where I can perform most of interaction with one, two, three fingers movement. I have tried all sorts of /boot/loader.conf and hw.psm.synaptics stuff but it does not work. I have simple mouse as in easly 90s :-(

Can you please give me a hint how to make my Synatics work like Apple's MacBook Trackpad?

Can I ask here or should I start new PR? :-)
